findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "get_group_stats" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

evidence.snippet: Call this when the user asks about the activity, health, leaderboard, mood, or trends of a specific Telegram group tracked by Limzo. `slug` is the last part of …

labels.name: get_global_stats
labels.description: Call this for network-wide numbers across all public Telegram groups tracked by Limzo (group count, messages, active users, replies, reactions, karma — 7-day and all-time) plus the current top groups by Limzo Score. For finding a specific group, prefer list_groups.

findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "get_global_stats" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "(hash 988edf12)" → after: "Call this for network-wide numbers across all public Telegram groups tracked by Limzo (group count, messages, active users, replies, reactions, karma — 7-day and all-time) plus the current top groups by Limzo Score. For finding a specific group, prefer list_groups."

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
